entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A traditional grain cereal grown in Africa and South Asia, known for its wide adaptation and nutritional value

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where finger millet is traditionally grown

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region where finger millet is traditionally grown

entities.name: ADVERSE SOIL AND WEATHER CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental stressors that finger millet is capable of withstanding

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The capacity of finger millet to produce grain

entities.name: METHIONINE
entities.description: An essential amino acid found in high concentrations in finger millet grain

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A nutritional mineral found in high concentrations in finger millet grain

entities.name: CALCIUM
entities.description: A nutritional mineral found in high concentrations in finger millet grain

entities.name: GERMPLASM RESOURCES
entities.description: Diverse genetic materials assembled to identify traits of agronomic importance for breeding superior varieties

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location of the ICRISAT genebank in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the ICRISAT genebank is located

entities.name: VULGARIS
entities.description: The most predominant race of finger millet, comprising 61% of the total collections

entities.name: AFRICANA
entities.description: A distinct race of finger millet that showed the highest means for 10 out of 14 quantitative traits

entities.name: QUALITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Five specific traits used to characterize finger millet accessions

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Fourteen specific traits used to characterize finger millet accessions and distinguish races

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A subset of 622 accessions based on geographical origin and quantitative traits to enhance crop improvement

entities.name: MINI-CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A further reduced subset of 65 accessions derived from the core collection

entities.name: GENERATION CHALLENGE PROGRAM
entities.description: A program under which a composite set of 1,000 germplasm accessions was developed

entities.name: MICROSATELLITE MARKERS
entities.description: Molecular markers used to access genes for beneficial traits

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Genetic units responsible for beneficial traits in finger millet
